aws.description: SSRF payloads targeting AWS EC2 instance metadata service (IMDS)

payloads.description: AWS IMDSv1 root metadata endpoint
IAM role listing endpoint
IAM credentials retrieval (replace role name)
EC2 user-data (may contain secrets)
IPv6-mapped IPv4 IMDSv1 bypass
nip.io DNS-based IP bypass
Decimal IP representation of 169.254.169.254
Instance hostname via metadata
IMDSv2 token request — PUT with TTL header to get session token (required when IMDSv1 is disabled)
IMDSv2 metadata with token — use token from PUT request in header to access metadata

gcp.description: SSRF payloads targeting Google Cloud Platform metadata service

payloads.description: GCP metadata root (requires Metadata-Flavor: Google header)
GCP default service account OAuth token
GCP metadata via IP address
GCP project ID retrieval
GKE kubernetes environment config (if running on GKE)

internal.description: SSRF payloads targeting internal network services

payloads.description: Localhost IPv4
All-interfaces address (routes to localhost on most systems)
IPv6 localhost
Localhost hostname
Common internal web port 8080
Common dev server port 3000
Elasticsearch default port
Redis default port
MongoDB default port
Common internal gateway
Common private network gateway

protocol.description: SSRF payloads using alternative URI schemes

payloads.description: Local file read via file:// scheme
Shadow file read via file:// scheme
Process environment variables via /proc
Gopher Redis RCE — CONFIG SET to write PHP shell via BGSAVE
Gopher protocol to Redis SET command
dict:// protocol to Redis INFO
SFTP scheme to exfiltrate via outbound connection
LDAP scheme to internal LDAP server

dns_rebind.description: DNS rebinding and time-of-check bypass payloads

payloads.description: 1u.ms DNS rebind service (resolves to 127.0.0.1 after first response)
Burp Collaborator for SSRF OOB detection
DNS wildcard resolving to metadata IP
DNS wildcard resolving to localhost

azure.description: SSRF payloads targeting Azure Instance Metadata Service (IMDS)

payloads.description: Azure IMDS instance metadata (requires Metadata:true header)
Azure managed identity OAuth token for ARM
Azure compute instance details (VM name, location, tags)

kubernetes.description: SSRF payloads targeting Kubernetes service discovery and cluster APIs

payloads.description: Kubernetes API namespace listing via internal DNS
Kubernetes secrets enumeration (requires service account token)
Kubernetes API via default ClusterIP service address
Kubernetes pod listing via internal DNS
GKE metadata endpoint for Kubernetes on GCP

localhost_bypass.description: Alternative localhost representations to bypass SSRF filters that block 127.0.0.1 and localhost

payloads.description: Shortened IPv4 — most OS stacks expand 127.1 to 127.0.0.1
Octal IP notation — 0177 = 127 in octal, bypasses decimal pattern matching
Hex IP notation — 0x7f = 127 in hex, evades decimal IP filters
Decimal IP as single integer — 127.0.0.1 as 32-bit unsigned int
IPv6 localhost — bypasses IPv4-only blocking rules
Zero address — routes to localhost on most Linux systems
Third-party DNS resolving to 127.0.0.1 — bypasses hostname-based filters
IPv6-mapped IPv4 localhost — dual-stack representation bypasses IPv4 filters

oracle_cloud.description: SSRF payloads targeting Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) instance metadata

payloads.description: OCI instance metadata root — returns instance details (id, region, shape)
OCI custom metadata — may contain user-defined secrets and config
OCI IMDSv2 endpoint — requires Authorization header with Bearer Oracle token

digitalocean.description: SSRF payloads targeting DigitalOcean Droplet metadata service

payloads.description: DigitalOcean full metadata as JSON — returns all droplet info in single response
DigitalOcean user-data — cloud-init scripts that may contain secrets
DigitalOcean private IP — useful for internal network pivoting

alibaba.description: SSRF payloads targeting Alibaba Cloud ECS instance metadata

payloads.description: Alibaba Cloud metadata root — uses unique 100.100.100.200 IP instead of 169.254.169.254
Alibaba Cloud RAM role credentials — equivalent to AWS IAM role credentials
Alibaba Cloud user-data — initialization scripts that may contain secrets
